stack_components.name: Week 1 Decision Support Report v1
stack_components.role: Model-only Week 1 slate summary, projection diagnostics, and placeholder market comparison surface.

stack_components.name: Team Capsule Detail Upgrade v1
stack_components.role: Read-only team profile and capsule detail layer for narrative context.

stack_components.name: Matchup Narrative Engine v1
stack_components.role: Game-level descriptive matchup narratives with market placeholders and no recommendation fields.

stack_components.name: Entity Coverage Audit v1
stack_components.role: Coverage accounting for expected FCS limitations, unexpected FBS gaps, and manual-review games.

stack_components.name: Weekly Operations v2
stack_components.role: Weekly workflow, manifest, and gating checks for Week 1 operations.

stack_components.name: Delivery Readiness Review v1
stack_components.role: Readiness review for report delivery surfaces and guardrails.

next_actions: Use the model-only Week 1 report for dry-run review.
Improve presentation/mobile formatting only if desired.
Wait for live Week 1 betting markets.
Refresh market input once real markets exist.
Do not modify model logic unless live validation exposes a structural issue.
decision_rationale: The reporting stack is ready for model-only preseason review and contains explicit placeholders for unavailable Week 1 betting markets. Market-aware reporting should wait until real markets are saved and validated. No recommendation, edge, sportsbook-line estimation, model, projection, calibration, confidence, market ingestion, or weekly pipeline logic is promoted by this review.
